_note: 239 (was 238): +1 for the Quick Capture page /capture (docs/34) — inherently client-first (camera capture via <input capture>, FileReader→data URL, react-query mutation + live 'my captures' list); a server shell + island split cannot remove the client island. 241 (was 239): +2 for the i18n client-islands localizing the pipeline & financial-health RSC dashboards (PR #410) — both required to run the client-only t() hook on a server-prefetched page. 242 (was 241): +1 for the god Platform Console island (/platform, platform-client.tsx) — an inherently interactive admin surface (company table with row actions, provision/invite dialogs, approve/reject mutations); it already uses the RSC server-shell + island split (page.tsx prefetches), so the island is the irreducible client boundary. 243 (was 242): +1 for the shop/basket requisition page /shop — inherently client-first like /capture (local basket state + qty steppers, per-line urgent toggle, free-text off-catalog request, plus the react-query catalog fetch + checkout mutation); the interactivity IS the page, so a server-shell/island split cannot remove the client island. 247 (was 243): +4 for the Finance Oracle-grade analytics islands (docs/35) — /finance/command-center, /finance/close-cockpit, /finance/treasury, /finance/profitability. Each is ALREADY the canonical RSC server-shell + client-island split (page.tsx prefetches via serverApi; the island renders): the island is irreducible because it runs the client-only t() hook (no server-side translation helper exists — cf. accounting/page.tsx 'RSC conversion #1', whose accounting-client.tsx island is the same shape), interactive drill/expand state (useState/useEffect), and the live fin_kpi_refresh SSE (useRealtime). A clean offset was investigated exhaustively and is NOT available: (a) zero 'use client' PAGES are convertible — every one calls a hook; (b) the only compose-only files are the 2 app layouts, but converting them to server components FAILS THE WEB BUILD ('Functions cannot be passed directly to Client Components' — the Lucide icon component refs in INTERNAL_NAV/PORTAL_NAV are non-serializable across the RSC boundary; verified via `pnpm --filter @ierp/web build`), and the remaining candidates are shared Radix UI primitives (app-wide blast radius). Same justified-exception category as the four bumps above. Justified exceptions to the down-only ratchet; a future app-wide refactor (nav icons keyed by string id + a client-side icon map) would let the layouts go server and bring this back down.
